---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for TaskClaw
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of what problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Integration contribution

If this is a new integration (e.g. Jira, Trello, Asana, Linear), are you interested in contributing it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this integration
- [ ] No, but I'd use it if someone else builds it

See our [integration guide](../../docs/integrations/adding-an-integration.md) for instructions.

## Additional context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or other context about the feature request here.
